name: source-application
description: KeePass Web — source monorepo. Builds self-contained HTML distributables for a KDBX password manager that runs entirely in the browser.

scripts.build: npm run build:deps && npm run build --workspace=pages
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:deps && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present && tsc --noEmit -p tools/serve-dist/tsconfig.json
scripts.test: npm run build:deps && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && npm run test:e2e --workspace=e2e
